Title: Relates to making widely available information on programs related to the hiring of veterans
Summary: Directs the department of veterans' services and the department of economic development to make available on their website information about federal and state programs available to businesses that employ veterans.
LawCode: Amd §4, Veterans' Services L; amd §100, Ec Dev L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the veterans' services law and the economic development law, in relation to making widely available information on programs related to the hiring of veterans
